analysis.reasoning: The tweet promotes a rule-of-law approach to anti-corruption, highlighting a new commission grounded in international and national law, defending unfettered investigations by the EU, and stressing the primacy of functioning national institutions. This aligns with multiple EU narratives: EU4 (avant-garde political actor) for innovative governance; EU5 (global champion of fair causes) for fairness in investigations; EU6 (contributes to a better world) through anti-corruption improvements; and EU3 (useful for its citizens) as such governance aims to benefit citizens.
